case_title: MORRIS, SOON BUK vs. KIM, CHONG YE AKA RAYAE, KIM JONG et al

docket_entries.description: THIS CASE WAS HEARD IN SUPERIOR COURT, DEPT X-37, JUDGE LEIGHTON HATCH, PRESIDING. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. WITNESSES SWORN/EXAMINED. EXHIBITS INTRODUCED & ADMITTED IN EVIDENCE. COURT FINDS JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT, PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, CHONG YE AKA RAYAE, KIM JONG $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,000.00, PLAINTIFF TO RECOVER COSTS OF SUIT. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
